name: Hieratic Sky Dragon Overlord of Heliopolis
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－エネアード
desc:
2 Level 8 monsters
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) on your field, your GY, and/or your banished card(s) (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 8 monsters
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) on your field, your GY, and/or your banished card(s) (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
eff:
2 Level 8 monsters
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) on your field, your GY, and/or your banished card(s) (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
